name: Crust Variations--Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Chocolate wafer cookies: 1 1/2 cups (finely ground - 24 cookies)
Pecans, almonds, pistachios, hazelnuts: 3 oz (toasted and finely ground)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except butter in a bowl.
2. Stir in butter until well blended.
3. For nut crusts, press the crust into a pan and bake at 325°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Let cool completely before filling with cheesecake batter.
